div.div: Choose a user to manage their privileges

div.span: These module-based records are overriding your group. Click Clean Up to remove them and let the group take effect.

div.div: No module privileges. Click + Add Module above to assign direct module-level privileges to this user.

Hide Menu Button
Add Menu
No menus found
Try searching by exact name.
Leave empty to see all menus.
Tip: "Apps" menu is a root menu —
try leaving the search blank and scroll.

t.div: No menu restrictions. Add a module above to see its menus here, or click Add Menu to hide a specific menu.

div.div:
Hide Module Button (App Icon)
Add App
()
No apps available

t.div: All app icons visible. Click Add App to hide specific app icons for this user.

div.div: Choose a group from the sidebar
No module privileges. Click + Add Module above to assign module-level privileges to this group.

Hide Menu Button (Group)
Add Menu
No menus found

t.div: No menu restrictions for this group. Click Add Menu to hide menus for all group members.

div.div:
Hide Module Button / App Icon (Group)
Add App
()
No apps available

t.div: All apps visible for this group. Click Add App to hide app icons for all group members.
